description_long: This is a tall, slender aluminum can with a matte dark blue exterior and a smooth, seamless cylindrical body. The top of the can is silver, featuring a standard pull tab opening mechanism, and the bottom is slightly concave, typical of beverage cans. There are no visible labels, logos, or text, giving the can a minimalist and unbranded appearance. The surface appears clean and free of condensation, with no decorative elements or patterns. The can is likely filled with beer, as suggested by its category, and is designed to be easily held and consumed from. Its size and shape are consistent with those of a standard 355-473 ml beer can commonly found in urban environments.
description: A tall, matte dark blue aluminum beer can with a silver pull tab top and no visible branding or graphics. The design is minimalist and unadorned.
description_view_0: The can is shown from a slightly angled front view, highlighting its smooth, dark blue body and silver top.
description_view_1: This view shows the can from a slightly rotated angle, maintaining the same minimalist appearance with no visible markings.
description_view_2: The can is viewed from another side, again displaying the unbroken dark blue surface and silver top.
description_view_3: A further rotated view, still showing the same featureless dark blue body and silver top.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior is a solid matte dark blue with no visible graphics, text, or decorative elements, resulting in a minimalist and unbranded appearance.
